name: 市场类型
subject: humanities
curriculum_points: Compare and contrast the characteristics of different market structures (perfect competition, monopoly, oligopoly, monopolistic competition) (AO2).
Evaluate the impact of market structure on efficiency, choice, innovation, and the allocation of resources (AO3).
